{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842574398105535208
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport base64\nimport json\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(tz=REDACTED new_job_id() -> str:\n    return str(uuid4())\n\n\ndef encode_cursor(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n    raw = json.dumps(payload, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=REDACTED\"utf-8\")\n    return base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw).decode(\"ascii\")\n\n\ndef decode_cursor(cursor: str | None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n    if cursor is None:\n        return None\n    raw = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(cursor.encode(\"ascii\"))\n    return json.loads(raw.decode(\"utf-8\"))\n\n\ndef json_dumps(value: Any) -> str:\n    return json.dumps(value, default=REDACTED, sort_keys=True, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"))\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Task registry and built-in tasks.\"\"\"\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError\n\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\n\n\nclass UnknownTaskError(KeyError):\n    pass\n\n\nclass TaskRegistry:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._definitions: dict[str, TaskDefinition[Any]] = {}\n\n    def register(self, definition: TaskDefinition[Any]) -> None:\n        self._definitions[definition.name] = definition\n\n    def get(self, name: str) -> TaskDefinition[Any]:\n        try:\n            return self._definitions[name]\n        except KeyError as exc:\n            raise UnknownTaskError(name) from exc\n\n    def validate_payload(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> BaseModel:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        try:\n            return definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        except ValidationError:\n            raise\n\n    @property\n    def names(self) -> set[str]:\n        return set(self._definitions.keys())\n\n    async def run(self, name: str, payload: dict[str, Any], context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        definition = self.get(name)\n        validated = definition.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        return await definition.handler(validated, context)\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nimport hashlib\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport httpx\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field, HttpUrl\n\nfrom miniq.retry import RetryPolicy\nfrom miniq.tasks.base import TaskContext, TaskDefinition\nfrom miniq.tasks.registry import TaskRegistry\n\n\nclass SleepPayload(BaseModel):\n    seconds: float = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    result: str = \"slept\"\n\n\nasync def run_sleep(payload: SleepPayload, context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    await context.sleep(payload.seconds)\n    return {\"message\": payload.result, \"seconds\": payload.seconds}\n\n\nclass HttpGetPayload(BaseModel):\n    url: HttpUrl\n    timeout_seconds: float = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED def run_http_get(payload: HttpGetPayload, _context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=REDACTED as client:\n        response = await client.get(str(payload.url))\n    return {\n        \"status_code\": response.status_code,\n        \"url\": str(payload.url),\n        \"body\": response.text,\n    }\n\n\nclass CpuBurnPayload(BaseModel):\n    iterations: int = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    seed: str = \"miniq\"\n\n\ndef _burn_cpu(iterations: int, seed: str) -> str:\n    digest = seed.encode(\"utf-8\")\n    for index in range(iterations):\n        digest = hashlib.sha256(digest + str(index).encode(\"utf-8\")).digest()\n    return hashlib.sha256(digest).hexdigest()\n\n\nasync def run_cpu_burn(payload: CpuBurnPayload, _context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    checksum = await asyncio.to_thread(_burn_cpu, payload.iterations, payload.seed)\n    return {\"iterations\": payload.iterations, \"checksum\": checksum}\n\n\nclass FailThenSucceedPayload(BaseModel):\n    failures_before_success: int = Field(ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    result: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=REDACTED {\"message\": \"ok\"})\n\n\nasync def run_fail_then_succeed(payload: FailThenSucceedPayload, context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    if context.attempt <= payload.failures_before_success:\n        msg = f\"failing attempt {context.attempt}\"\n        raise RuntimeError(msg)\n    return payload.result\n\n\nclass PipelineDemoPayload(BaseModel):\n    steps: int = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    step_delay_seconds: float = Field(default=REDACTED, ge=REDACTED, le=REDACTED    label: str = \"pipeline\"\n\n\nasync def run_pipeline_demo(payload: PipelineDemoPayload, context: TaskContext) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    completed_steps = 0\n    for index in range(payload.steps):\n        if await context.is_cancel_requested():\n            raise asyncio.CancelledError(f\"canceled at step {index}\")\n        await context.sleep(payload.step_delay_seconds)\n        completed_steps += 1\n        context.logger.info(\n            \"pipeline step complete\",\n            extra=REDACTED                \"job_id\": context.job_id,\n                \"attempt\": context.attempt,\n                \"queue\": context.queue,\n            },\n        )\n    return {\"label\": payload.label, \"completed_steps\": completed_steps}\n\n\ndef register_builtin_tasks(\n    registry: TaskRegistry,\n    *,\n    default_retry_policy: RetryPolicy,\n) -> None:\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"sleep\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"http_get\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"cpu_burn\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"fail_then_succeed\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n    registry.register(\n        TaskDefinition(\n            name=REDACTED\"pipeline_demo\",\n            payload_model=REDACTED,\n            handler=REDACTED,\n            retry_policy=REDACTED,\n        )\n    )\n\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}

%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253AI64%2522%253A4842574398105535208%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A4%252C%25227%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnimport%2Bbase64%255Cnimport%2Bjson%255Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2BUTC%252C%2Bdatetime%255Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%255Cnfrom%2Buuid%2Bimport%2Buuid4%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Butc_now%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bdatetime%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bdatetime.now%2528tz%3DREDACTED%2Bnew_job_id%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bstr%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bstr%2528uuid4%2528%2529%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bencode_cursor%2528payload%253A%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bstr%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Braw%2B%253D%2Bjson.dumps%2528payload%252C%2Bseparators%253DREDACTED%2522%252C%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522%253A%255C%2522%2529%252C%2Bsort_keys%253DREDACTED%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bbase64.urlsafe_b64encode%2528raw%2529.decode%2528%255C%2522ascii%255C%2522%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bdecode_cursor%2528cursor%253A%2Bstr%2B%257C%2BNone%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2B%257C%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bif%2Bcursor%2Bis%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2BNone%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Braw%2B%253D%2Bbase64.urlsafe_b64decode%2528cursor.encode%2528%255C%2522ascii%255C%2522%2529%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bjson.loads%2528raw.decode%2528%255C%2522utf-8%255C%2522%2529%2529%255Cn%255Cn%255Cndef%2Bjson_dumps%2528value%253A%2BAny%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bstr%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bjson.dumps%2528value%252C%2Bdefault%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bsort_keys%253DTrue%252C%2Bseparators%253DREDACTED%2522%252C%255C%2522%252C%2B%255C%2522%253A%255C%2522%2529%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522Task%2Bregistry%2Band%2Bbuilt-in%2Btasks.%255C%2522%255C%2522%255C%2522%255Cn%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bpydantic%2Bimport%2BBaseModel%252C%2BValidationError%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.tasks.base%2Bimport%2BTaskContext%252C%2BTaskDefinition%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BUnknownTaskError%2528KeyError%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bpass%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BTaskRegistry%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2B__init__%2528self%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bself._definitions%253A%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BTaskDefinition%255BAny%255D%255D%2B%253D%2B%257B%257D%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bregister%2528self%252C%2Bdefinition%253A%2BTaskDefinition%255BAny%255D%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bself._definitions%255Bdefinition.name%255D%2B%253D%2Bdefinition%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bget%2528self%252C%2Bname%253A%2Bstr%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BTaskDefinition%255BAny%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bself._definitions%255Bname%255D%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BKeyError%2Bas%2Bexc%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%2BUnknownTaskError%2528name%2529%2Bfrom%2Bexc%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bvalidate_payload%2528self%252C%2Bname%253A%2Bstr%252C%2Bpayload%253A%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BBaseModel%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdefinition%2B%253D%2Bself.get%2528name%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bdefinition.payload_model.model_validate%2528payload%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BValidationError%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Braise%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2540property%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdef%2Bnames%2528self%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bset%255Bstr%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bset%2528self._definitions.keys%2528%2529%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bdef%2Brun%2528self%252C%2Bname%253A%2Bstr%252C%2Bpayload%253A%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%252C%2Bcontext%253A%2BTaskContext%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdefinition%2B%253D%2Bself.get%2528name%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bvalidated%2B%253D%2Bdefinition.payload_model.model_validate%2528payload%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2Bawait%2Bdefinition.handler%2528validated%252C%2Bcontext%2529%255Cn%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cn%255Cnimport%2Basyncio%255Cnimport%2Bhashlib%255Cnfrom%2Bdataclasses%2Bimport%2Bdataclass%255Cnfrom%2Btyping%2Bimport%2BAny%255Cn%255Cnimport%2Bhttpx%255Cnfrom%2Bpydantic%2Bimport%2BBaseModel%252C%2BField%252C%2BHttpUrl%255Cn%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.retry%2Bimport%2BRetryPolicy%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.tasks.base%2Bimport%2BTaskContext%252C%2BTaskDefinition%255Cnfrom%2Bminiq.tasks.registry%2Bimport%2BTaskRegistry%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BSleepPayload%2528BaseModel%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bseconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2BField%2528ge%253DREDACTED%252C%2Ble%253DREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2Bresult%253A%2Bstr%2B%253D%2B%255C%2522slept%255C%2522%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Brun_sleep%2528payload%253A%2BSleepPayload%252C%2Bcontext%253A%2BTaskContext%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bcontext.sleep%2528payload.seconds%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2B%257B%255C%2522message%255C%2522%253A%2Bpayload.result%252C%2B%255C%2522seconds%255C%2522%253A%2Bpayload.seconds%257D%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BHttpGetPayload%2528BaseModel%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Burl%253A%2BHttpUrl%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btimeout_seconds%253A%2Bfloat%2B%253D%2BField%2528default%253DREDACTED%252C%2Bge%253DREDACTED%252C%2Ble%253DREDACTED%2Bdef%2Brun_http_get%2528payload%253A%2BHttpGetPayload%252C%2B_context%253A%2BTaskContext%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2Bdict%255Bstr%252C%2BAny%255D%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bhttpx.AsyncClient%2528timeout%253DREDACTED%2Bas%2Bclient%253A%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresponse%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.get%2528str%2528payload.url%2529%2529%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breturn%2B%257B%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522status_code%255C%2522%253A%2Bresponse.status_code%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522url%255C%2522%253A%2Bstr%2528payload.url%2529%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522body%255C%2522%253A%2Bresponse.text%252C%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%257D%255Cn%255Cn%255Cnclass%2BCpuBurnPayload%2528BaseModel%2529%253A%255Cn%2B%2
